emails.subject: changes
emails.body: It looks like you made quite a few changes to some deals and I don't see anything in the comment section. Can you just take a quick look and see if you know what you changed on any of these. If not, I can look it up in the audit viewer, but it makes things go a lot quicker if we don't have to go into the audit viewer for each deal. Thanks! #508957 #517889 #517881 #517880 #517878 #517875 #517874

emails.subject: Re: changes
emails.body: Re: changes 508957 changed offset from -1.5 to -1 on 2/6 per Stephanie Piwetz (verbal Mirant checkout) All the rest of the deals I entered for Mike Swerzbin yesterday in my deal blotter, which defaults to Short Term California. I noticed immediately after saving the deals that they were under the wrong desk, and changed them to Long Term Northwest in deal entry. Are there other problems with the deals? The only change should be the desk. Please let me know. Thanks, Kate From: Sharen Cason 02/09/2001 07:53 AM
